name: Sprint 10
context: Primary focus areas: Security (2), Integrations (1), Quality (1).

notable_completed.title: Component Library (shadcn/ui)
notable_completed.summary: All 24 components built on Radix UI primitives for accessibility Storybook configured with @storybook/addon-a11y for continuous accessibility testing Components follow shadcn/ui patterns with class-variance-authority for variants Full test......
notable_completed.definitionOfDone: Reusable components with Storybook docs; artifacts: accessibility-audit.json, component-usage.csv, context_ack.json; targets: >=100%

notable_completed.title: ERP/Payment/Email Connectors
notable_completed.summary: All adapters follow hexagonal architecture (ports and adapters pattern); Result pattern used for error handling; OAuth2 flows implemented where applicable SAP ERP adapter created; Stripe payment adapter created; PayPal payment adapter created
notable_completed.definitionOfDone: ERP sync functional, payments processed, emails sent; artifacts: connector-status-dashboard.json, context_ack.json; verified by: pnpm test; Each adapter must have integration test AND be wired to an API router
notable_completed.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: SAP ERP adapter created; Stripe payment adapter created; PayPal payment adapter created

notable_completed.title: Workflow Engine Evaluation & Implementation
notable_completed.description: Evaluate n8n; custom engine; and Temporal; document decision via ADR; build event-driven minimal rules engine and integrate selected workflow engine
notable_completed.summary: Temporal recommended for reliability in mission-critical workflows Hybrid architecture provides right tool for each workflow type Rules engine provides low-latency synchronous rule evaluation All 26 integration tests passing with 100% succe......
notable_completed.definitionOfDone: Comparative analysis of workflow options; ADR published; POC implemented; events published for case status changes; selected engine integrated to process simple workflows; training delivered; artifacts: adr-workflow-decision.md, events-spec.yaml, context_ack.json; targets: >=95%; verified by: pnpm test
notable_completed.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Comparative analysis of workflow options; ADR published; POC implemented; events published for case status changes; selected engine integrated to process simple workflows; training delivered

notable_completed.title: Secrets Management & Encryption
notable_completed.description: Implement secrets management and encryption at rest and in transit
notable_completed.summary: Secrets stored in vault, encrypted connections (TLS/mTLS), data encryption implemented
notable_completed.definitionOfDone: Secrets stored in vault, encrypted connections (TLS/mTLS), data encryption implemented; artifacts: vault-config.yaml, encryption.ts, key-rotation.ts, encryption-tests.md; targets: >=100%
notable_completed.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Secrets stored in vault, encrypted connections (TLS/mTLS), data encryption implemented

notable_completed.title: Schedule periodic secret rotation and dependency vulnerability updates
notable_completed.description: Schedule periodic secret rotation and dependency vulnerability updates
notable_completed.summary: Rotation schedule uses production-appropriate intervals (90-365 days) Emergency rotation procedure documented with audit logging CVE response playbook includes escalation matrix and communication templates Dependency scanning integrated int......
notable_completed.definitionOfDone: Rotations automated via CI; dependencies scanned weekly; patches applied; artifacts: rotation-schedule.yaml, dependency-scan-report.md, dependency-scan.yml
notable_completed.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Secret rotation schedule created; Weekly dependency scans configured; Automated patching workflow implemented
